source_fix.root_cause: The previous loopback safety fix suppressed a specific required tool_choice for non-Gemma local vMLX loopback sessions, but also dropped tool_choice entirely. N2 JANGTQ2 then avoided the second requested run_command in the strict long-delta UI proof. The required hard-error was gone, but tool pressure was too weak for the second turn.
source_fix.fix: When a local vMLX loopback session explicitly names one built-in tool and a specific tool_choice would be suppressed, send non-required tool_choice='auto' instead. This keeps tool use enabled without forcing the specific required-tool path that previously produced tool_calls_required errors.
source_fix.diagnostic_addition: Panel request summaries now include a redacted tool_choice field so future live proof logs can distinguish required specific tool_choice, auto, and omitted tool_choice.

cd panel && npm test -- tests/tool-auto-continue.test.ts tests/tool-status-responsiveness.test.ts -> 18 passed
cd panel && npm run typecheck -> pass
